title: Land fix/conversation-coherence to main (branch carries brain server, extension, profiles, coherence fix)
current_state: Branch is 1 commit ahead of main (0fac950 'Prep for public repo') plus ~78 modified and ~30 untracked files (~4,774 insertions) uncommitted. Nearly everything demo-critical lives uncommitted: app/server.py (FastAPI brain server, T-187), web/ (chat UI, T-189), extension/ (Chrome MV3, T-190), agent/profile.py (multi-profile auth T-221..T-226), agent/conversation.py, agent/storage.py, golden tests. agent/respond.py and app/state.py are deleted from the tree but already archived (docs/_archive/agent_respond_v1.py, docs/_archive/app_state_v1.py) so the no-delete rule is satisfied. verify.py reports PASS 150/150 on the working tree.
target_state: All work committed to fix/conversation-coherence in reviewable chunks and merged to main. verify.py PASS before and after every commit. PI.md auto-sections refreshed after the merge.
migration_plan: 1. Run: python scripts/verify.py --quiet then check exit code directly (NEVER pipe verify - T-214). Must PASS before touching anything.
2. Run the privacy guard: python scripts/passive/privacy_publish_guard.py - the last commit was public-repo prep, so re-confirm nothing private is about to be staged.
3. Add a .gitattributes normalizing line endings (heavy CRLF churn observed in diffs) before staging anything.

4. Commit in 3-4 chunks, Ash gates each one: (a) coherence core - agent/conversation.py, agent/storage.py, tools/tools_memory.py, golden tests; (b) server+web+extension - app/server.py, web/, extension/; (c) profiles+telegram - agent/profile.py, tools/tools_telegram.py; (d) docs and remaining files.
5. Merge to main (Ash gates), then run: python scripts/refresh_pi.py.
risk_notes: Ash-gated git work, NOT a sprint/Sonnet auto ticket - no commit or push happens without Ash's explicit go (CLAUDE.md rule 1). Nothing else in this hackathon-prep batch is safe to build until this lands; if verify breaks during chunking, stop and fix before proceeding. This ticket is the whale of week 1. Renumbered from T-249 to T-272 on 2026-07-05: a concurrent session closed a DIFFERENT ticket under T-249 (telegram_react/image_gen normie fix, source: Ash live bug report) - see tickets/closed/T-249-telegram-react-image-gen-blocked-normie.json. No content lost; this is purely an ID-collision fix.
